title: Zeldacraft Server Pack
description: A lightweight cosmetic and stability pack for the ZeldaCraft Server Community.
body:
This is a small collection of stability and cosmetic mods for the ZeldaCraft Community with server IP prebaked in. The mods in this pack are largely aimed at improving Minecraft's overall performance and feel while adding something a little extra to give the game a bit more life, such as Better Animations Collection and Effective, for the roleplayers, there is Figura which allows players to make and use fully custom player models. We recommend using at minimum 4 gigabytes of ram to run this pack.
 
Regarding the server, ZeldaCraft is an amazing Legend of Zelda-themed Minecraft server that has been running strong since May 20th, 2012. There is a wonderful community of friendly players and a quality staff team to help out. The staff team have worked together with the community for years to create a community that's fun for fans of all Zelda games or Minecraft in general to play.

About Us:
- 2-Year-Old Map, Plenty of exploring to do.
- Custom Spell Plugin
- Custom Items and Recipes
- Long-Term Players and New Players constantly
- Zelda-themed builds and events
- Custom-coded dungeons
- Vanilla survival gameplay
- Shops
- Custom Resource Pack
If you're a fan of Minecraft or The Legend of Zelda, come join our server and discord! We'd love to meet you!
